q: Which 1Password item (and field) holds the SSH private key the git-mirror-backup CronJob uses to reach the NAS?
hops: git-mirror-cronjob.yaml secretName backup-ssh-key -> backup-jobs/external-secret.yaml remoteRef synology_backup/private key

q: What tag pattern must a newly pushed mtgibbs-site container image match for Flux to auto-deploy it?
Which two Flux Kustomizations must both be ready before the cert-manager-config Kustomization applies?
Which CronJob (give its metadata name) backs up Jellyfin's config PVC?
hops: jellyfin config PVC -> backup-jobs/backup-cronjob.yaml PVCS list jellyfin_jellyfin-config, CronJob name pvc-backup; distractors media-backup/worker2-backup mention no jellyfin

q: When Vector detects a device evading Pi-hole for DNS, what full ntfy URI does the alert get published to?
Which LAN IPs does the cluster's Tailscale Connector advertise as /32 subnet routes?
hops: tailscale-config/connector.yaml advertiseRoutes; distractor private-exit-node/ also tailscale-flavored

q: Which 1Password item and field supply the Pi-hole API key used by the Homepage dashboard's widget?
hops: homepage/configmap.yaml widget env -> homepage/external-secret.yaml homepage-pihole remoteRef pihole/api-key; distractors jellyfin/immich entries in same file. Proximity grade: v1 slash-literal grade false-negatived a correct 'item pihole / field api-key' answer; lowercase 'pihole' avoids matching the question's 'Pi-hole' echo

q: What in-cluster DNS name does the kiwix-mcp server use to reach kiwix-serve?
hops: kiwix-mcp/deployment.yaml env -> kiwix.kiwix.svc.cluster.local; distractor: public ingress hostname
